message:
test(bubbletea-macros): Add comprehensive unit tests for macro code generation (charmed_rust-y3n)

Add extensive test coverage for the derive macro:

- state_change_detection.rs: Runtime tests verifying state change
  detection behavior including:
  - Basic change detection for int/string fields
  - Custom equality function tests (within/beyond tolerance)
  - Skipped field verification
  - No-state-fields always returns false
  - Generic model state detection
  - Multiple snapshot correctness

- UI pass tests:
  - empty_struct.rs: Empty named struct derives correctly
  - many_fields.rs: 8+ field structs with mixed tracking
  - complex_types.rs: Vec, HashMap, Option, Box types
  - combined_state_options.rs: Single field with eq+debug combined

- Unit tests in model.rs:
  - test_combined_eq_and_debug: Single field with both options
  - test_multiple_combined_eq_and_debug: Multi-field coverage

Note: Multi-field combined eq+debug has known parsing issues in
trybuild due to block/|| interaction. Unit tests provide coverage
for this case.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
